items.title: Netflix's 'Heartstopper' sparked global book-buying boom, study finds
items.summary: A Netflix adaptation helped transform "Heartstopper" from a popular graphic novel into a global mainstream publishing success, according to new research from The University of Manchester and Princeton University.

items.title: Meet the Milky Way’s puffiest planets
items.summary: Two “superpuff” planets orbiting a sunlike star over 1,000 light-years from Earth are as big as Jupiter and as dense as cotton candy.
